name: COTI Blockchain MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for COTI blockchain — a privacy-focused Layer 2 network built on Ethereum that enables confidential transactions using garbled circuits. Enables AI agents to connect to COTI blockchain, manage accounts, transfer native tokens, and interact with COTI's privacy-preserving payment infrastructure.
use_cases: Managing COTI accounts and token transfers from blockchain AI agents
Interacting with COTI's privacy-preserving payment layer from DeFi agents
Building privacy-focused payment workflows on COTI from AI applications
Querying COTI on-chain data for analytics from blockchain agents
not_for: Financial trading automation without proper authorization
Teams without specific COTI use cases
best_when: A developer building on COTI's privacy Layer 2 blockchain wants AI agents to interact with the COTI ecosystem — enabling programmatic account management and token operations.
avoid_when: You don't have COTI-specific use cases. COTI is a niche privacy Layer 2 — for general Ethereum L2, there are more mainstream alternatives.

auth.notes: Private key or API key for COTI account operations. Never expose private keys to agents. Use read-only operations where possible.

pricing.free_tier_limits: COTI blockchain queries are free; COTI tokens required for transactions
pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP server; gas fees apply for transactions
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. COTI tokens needed for blockchain transactions.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Blockchain token transfers are irreversible — implement strict safeguards
NEVER expose private keys to AI agents — use read-only signing services
COTI is a niche blockchain — validate ecosystem maturity before production use
COTI's privacy features add complexity to transaction verification
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Irreversible blockchain transactions. Private key must never be exposed to agents. Read-only operations are safer. COTI privacy features require careful implementation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Blockchain financial risk. Private key security critical. Irreversible transactions. Never expose keys to agents.
